protocol.name: CRES-1 — Causal Residual Expert Switcher
protocol.claim: The continuation-versus-reversion sign of an extreme factor-neutral alt residual is conditionally predictable from the event state and only already-completed expert outcomes; high-confidence events retain positive market-neutral pair returns after costs while a causal range-risk scaler limits tail exposure.

development_disclosure.multiplicity: The research process screened rolling and exponentially weighted experts, ridge windows/penalties, abstention levels, regime rules, stops, and risk scalers. Nothing in 2023-2025 is OOS evidence.

universe.position: one factor-beta-neutral long/short alt pair or flat; no BTC leg
universe.structural_orthogonality: cross-sectional relative value rather than BTC direction, REX, BTC OI, funding/premium gate, Kimchi/FX, or LLM directional prediction

source_contract.funding: exact symbol funding timestamps; no fill or synthetic rate

base_event.completed_hour: 12 exact completed 5m bars, right-labelled at signal time
base_event.leave_one_out_factor: median hourly return of the other five symbols
base_event.reservation: start flat at 2026-01-01; reserve non-overlapping 12h events

online_policy.target: continuation net log return minus reversion net log return at 6bp/side with exact funding
online_policy.full_information_update: after each event exit, both directional counterfactuals are observable from the same frozen OHLC/funding path and may train later events
online_policy.initial_training_seed: all frozen 2023-2025 event features and expert outcomes
online_policy.feature_standardization: training rows only; zero for zero-variance columns
online_policy.target_centering: subtract training target mean for fit; do not add mean/intercept to prediction
online_policy.confidence: abs(prediction) > 82.5th percentile of abs in-sample fitted predictions

risk_policy.measure: maximum across proposed legs of RMS log(high/low) over 864 completed 5m bars
risk_policy.reference: median risk of prior 52 base events, independent of outcomes

execution.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry HWM; entry cost first; funding cash included; favorable long-high/short-low before adverse long-low/short-high for every held bar; hypothetical liquidation cost at every mark; scheduled exit cost
execution.cagr: full 2026-01-01 through 2026-07-01 wall-clock including idle periods

deployment_boundary.reason: the current executor does not yet provide atomic two-leg alt pair execution, partial-fill neutralization, and pair-level reservation

protocol.stop_rule: Freeze source, outcome-blind base clock, historical seed, evaluator source, and tests before opening 2026 post-entry returns. Run the exact evaluator once. If any strategy gate fails, retire CRES-1; do not repair thresholds, sign, hold, risk scaling, symbols, or model hyperparameters on 2026. Orthogonality is evaluated only after strategy pass.
